title: Reactions on Mac, Performance Boost & Better Sync
description: This release brings native tapback reactions to macOS—now you can react to messages with hearts, thumbs up, and custom emoji just like on iOS! We've also dramatically reduced CPU usage for a snappier experience and fixed several CloudKit sync issues to keep your messages flowing smoothly.
features: React to messages on macOS with hearts, thumbs up/down, laughs, and custom emoji—fully synced with iMessage
Dismiss chats individually from the 'No response needed' section instead of only dismissing all at once
AI responses now include temporal awareness for more contextually relevant replies
fixes: Massively reduced CPU usage by optimizing menu bar button and limiting shimmer animations
Fixed CloudKit message sync creating false conflicts and duplicate uploads
Fixed subscription attribution and referral codes not working properly on Mac
Fixed send button icon being invisible on iOS
Fixed group chats not opening properly from Messages and conversation view loading issues
Fixed repo setup issues for new developers
